title: actions.js — updatePaymentPlanDetails payload adds billingCycle label
commit_message: feat: pass billingCycle through updatePaymentPlanDetails for receipts

why_plan_action_only.explanation: Only actions.js changes. Tests listing actions.js in sources[] are the updatePaymentPlanDetails pair plus updateUserCards triple in payment-state.cross.test.js. CRITICAL = direct symbol match. HIGH = sibling describes in the same cross-dependent file (updateUserCards, CLEARCARDS, storageKeys, CARD_NUMBER_REGEX) — defensive same-file inclusion after scenario 10’s pattern.
why_plan_action_only.key_point: 2 CRITICAL + 10 HIGH = 12 selected; 65 SKIP — narrow blast radius, different symbol than scenario 10’s updateUserCards.

tests.test: updatePaymentPlanDetails action and paymentReducer > stores the subscription plan object in paymentPlantDetails
tests.why: describe + symbols reference updatePaymentPlanDetails; sources include actions.js

tests.test: updatePaymentPlanDetails action and paymentReducer > does not mutate userCards when a plan update is dispatched

HIGH.reason: Same cross-dependent file (payment-state.cross.test.js) — sibling describe blocks

tests.test: updateUserCards action dispatched into paymentReducer > populates userCards in state after dispatch
updateUserCards action dispatched into paymentReducer > sets cardsFetched to true when cards are provided
updateUserCards action dispatched into paymentReducer > clears userCards when dispatched with an empty array
paymentActions.CLEARCARDS resets payment state > resets userCards to an empty array
paymentActions.CLEARCARDS resets payment state > resets cardsFetched back to false after clearing
storageKeys align with payment flow expectations > storageKeys.stripePaymentDetails equals STRIPEPAYMENTDETAILS
storageKeys align with payment flow expectations > storageKeys.token equals TOKEN
CARD_NUMBER_REGEX validates checkout flow input > accepts a standard 19-character card number with spaces
CARD_NUMBER_REGEX validates checkout flow input > rejects a card number shorter than 17 characters
CARD_NUMBER_REGEX validates checkout flow input > rejects a card number that contains letters

SKIP.reason: actions.js not in sources[] for standalone, auth-storage, or feature suites

coverage_gaps.detail: billingCycle is not asserted in any test; consider expecting it on the dispatched action object.

jest_run_command: npx jest --config test_repository/jest.config.js --no-coverage -t "updatePaymentPlanDetails|updateUserCards|paymentActions\.CLEARCARDS|storageKeys align with payment flow|CARD_NUMBER_REGEX validates checkout" --verbose
